titleStmt.title: SII 34.186: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 186. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock below the Chōḷēśvara shrine in front of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 11th year, Vṛiśchika, Monday = A.D. 1081.

This records a sale of land by the ūrār of Kannamātūr to the temple on the hill Tiruvāṭpōkkimalai. An uḍaiyāṉ of Māyaṉ-marutūr in Mīkōṭtu-nāḍu in Sarvalōkāśraya-vaḷanāḍu paid the sale price (2 kāsu) and also the tax capital (16 kāsu) to the ūrār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻcūḻnta puṇari Akaḻcūḻnta puviyil ponnEmiyaḷavuttan nEmi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai IḷaṅkOparuvattu
cakkarakōṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇattu vāri Ayil muṉaikka kon=taḷavaraiyār tan=taḷami
ṟai kaḻittut tōḷvali kāṭṭip pōrparinaṭātti kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit ten=ticai
ṭit ten=ticait tēmaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉṉiyāṭai nannilappāvaiyun=taṉi
ppuṉit tirumaṇimakuṭa murimaiyiṟ cūṭi Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇun taṉātu tiruniḻal ve
ṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani mēruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vāṟkaṭaṟ ṟīvāntarattu pūpālar tiṟaiviṭu kiḻañ corika
ḷiṟu muṟainiṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavaṉ karun=talai paruntalaittiṭat taṉ poṉṉakarp puṟattiṭai
kkiṭappa Iṉṉāḷp piṟaippōl niṟpa piḻaiketelañ colletir kōṭiṟṟallatu taṉkaivil
letir kōṭā vikkalaṉ kallatar naṅkilit tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenaṟ tuṅkapattirai yaḷavun taṉ
Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa taṉmāṉamuṅ kūṟiṉa vīramuṅ kiṭappa Ēṟiṉamalaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa vi
ḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭaintōṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talai virittalamarattiṭa ticai taṉṉāḷukantut tāṉun tā
ṉaiyum paṉṉāḷiṭṭa muṭi palapala mutukump payantetir māṟiya cayapperun=tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta
taiyarīṭṭamum mīḷātu koṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅka maṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṉa veṉṉum paraṇiyuṅ koṇṭum Oru vicai
kaikkoṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻōṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷa tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittaruḷi veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum porukarik kalaṅkaḷu tan
tiravāriyum Uṭaiccāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu pōlat tan peruñcēṉaiēvipañcavaraivarumporutapōrkkaḷattañciveruneḷittōṭi Araṇena pukka
kāṭaṟattuṭaittuk kāṭaṭi paṭuttu maṟṟavartammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟai veñcuram pōkki koṟṟa vijaiyastampanticaitōṟum niṟutti muttincalāpamu muttamiḻp potiyil mattaveṅkari paṭum mai
yaccaiyyamum kanniyu kaikkoṇṭaruḷi tennāṭṭalaikāṭṭiya kaṭalmalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāvēṟellān tanivicumpēṟa māvēṟiya tan varuntani talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiya kōṭṭāṟuḷpaṭa neṟi tōṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭa
ruḷi tiṟaḷkoḷ siṁhāsanattiruntaruḷi poṅkoḷi yāramun tiruppuyatta laṅkalum pōl vīramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārmicai mēvalar viḷaṅka vīra siṁhāsasaṉattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōvirāja kēcāri panmarāna tri
puvaṉaccakkaravatti kolōttuṅka cōḻa tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu sarvvalōkāśraya vaḷanāṭṭu mīkōṭṭu nāṭṭu māyaṉmarutūr Uṭaiyāṉ Ivvāṭṭai vṛccikanāyaṟṟu pakṣattut tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
ttināḷ śvaramuṭaiyāṟ tirumuṟṟattē kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟa kūṭi Iruntu Innāṭṭuk kuṟunāṭṭut tiruvāṭpōkkimalai sukhāsana meḻuntaruḷiyirunta ku mūlyabṛttarākiya
śvaradevaṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr pulattu veṭṭappEṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkku kīḻpāṟkellai nakkaṉ peruṅkulaikku mEṟku
kukkiḻakkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyiluṭpaṭṭa nilam tiruvulakaḷan=taruḷinapaṭi nilam Ēḻumāvum śaṇḍeśvadevaṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta
kācu 2 Iṉṉilattukku Iṟaikāvalāka koṇṭa kācu 10 6 Āka kācu patiṉeṭṭum koṇṭu Innilattukku śantrātityaval Iṟai Iṟukkaṭavōmākavum Innilattukku Itu vē
tip poruṭ celavōlaiyāvitākavum Ituvallatu vēṟu porumāvaṟutip poruḷc cilavōlai kāṭṭukaveṉa kāṭṭakkaṭavarallātārākavum Ipparicu cammatittu Ikkācum kaikkoṇṭu Innilam Ēḻumāvum śaṇḍeśvara
devaṟku vilai Āvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttOm kaṉnamātūr ŪrOm Ivvūrkkuccamaintu
Digital edition of SII 34.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
